steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation so each $y$-value can be found from $x$:
$$
5x-4y=-68
$$
$$
4y=68+5x
$$
$$
y=\frac{68+5x}{4}
$$

steps.title: Test the table values
steps.content:
For the $x$-values in choice A:
$$
x=0:\ y=17
$$
$$
x=4:\ y=22
$$
$$
x=8:\ y=27
$$
These make the ordered pairs $(0,17)$, $(4,22)$, and $(8,27)$.

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: Those three pairs are exactly the corresponding values in the first table. The answer is A.
